headline: CrowdStrike Expands AI Security Reach Through QuiltWorks And Microsoft Defender
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) expanded its Project QuiltWorks AI cybersecurity coalition with new global technology and consulting partners. New members include Armadin, Cognizant, HCLTech, Infosys, KPMG, NTT DATA, Tata Consultancy Services, and Wipro. The company also launched Falcon OverWatch for Defender, bringing AI powered threat hunting to Microsoft endpoint customers. CrowdStrike Holdings, trading at about $505.74, has seen very strong multi year share price appreciation,...
